name: Carmen Bradford
abstract: Carmen Bradford (born July 19, 1960, in Austin, Texas) is an American jazz singer. She sang with the Count Basie Orchestra from 1983 to 1991.

concerts.label: JVC Jazz Festival: Nancy Wilson, Singer, and Joe Williams, Singer, with The Count Basie Orchestra
Absolut Vocalese: An Evening with Jon Hendricks

about_quotes.speaker: Frank Foster and Bill Hughes
about_quotes.evidence: I sold Carmen Bradford on the idea of singing it... we got recorded... We don’t play it anymore now that Carmen’s not with the band
about_quotes.doc_title: Frank Foster and Bill Hughes interviewed by Monk Rowe and Michael Woods, Schenectady, New York, March 28, 1995
